TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-pear_panay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: i sawni haw mamelaw i i tiza i nipaazih nu atiwawa a kungku.
S.PHON: i sawni ħaw mamər~ɾaw i i tiza i nipaaziħ nu atiwawa a kuŋku.
S.FORM: i sawni haw mamelaw i i tiza i nipaazih nu atiwawa a kungku.
S.PHON: i sawni ħaw mamər~ɾaw i i tiza i nipaaziħ nu atiwawa a kuŋku.
S.TRANSL: 剛剛看到的是要給小孩看的故事書.

TRANSL.notes: What (I) had just read was a story for children.

S.TRANSL: What had just read was a story for children.

S.FORM: izaw kya cacay a babalaki mikalic i tiza i kilang.
S.PHON: izaw kja ʦaʦaj a babar~ɾaki mikar~ɾiʦ i tiza i kir~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: izaw kya cacay a babalaki mikalic i tiza i kilang.
S.PHON: izaw kja ʦaʦaj a babar~ɾaki mikar~ɾiʦ i tiza i kir~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 有一個老人在那裡爬樹.
An old man was climbing a tree over there.

S.FORM: nikalican niza a kilang u heci siheciay u heci niza u kayabes.
S.PHON: nikar~ɾiʦan niza a kir~ɾaŋ u ħəʦi siħəʦiaj u ħəʦi niza u kajabəs.
S.FORM: nikalican niza a kilang u heci siheciay u heci niza u kayabes.
S.PHON: nikar~ɾiʦan niza a kir~ɾaŋ u ħəʦi siħəʦiaj u ħəʦi niza u kajabəs.
S.TRANSL: 他爬的是果樹,而果實是番石榴.
What he climbed was a fruit tree, which bore guavas.

S.FORM: tabaki isaw kya angangan nya kayabes.
S.PHON: tabaki isaw kja aŋaŋan nja kajabəs.
S.FORM: tabaki isaw kya angangan nya kayabes.
S.PHON: tabaki isaw kja aŋaŋan nja kajabəs.
S.TRANSL: 那番石榴樹很大啦.
That guava tree was huge.

S.FORM: E yadahtu ku nialaan niza izaw kya mikitinay tu tu sizi a pahutinay kya sa.
S.PHON: ə jadaħtu ku niar~ɾaan niza izaw kja mikitinaj tu tu sizi a paħutinaj kja sa.
S.FORM: E yadahtu ku nialaan niza izaw kya mikitinay tu tu sizi a pahutinay kya sa.
S.PHON: ə jadaħtu ku niar~ɾaan niza izaw kja mikitinaj tu tu sizi a paħutinaj kja sa.

TRANSL.notes: 他拿了很多(番石榴),有人牽著羊.

S.TRANSL: 他拿了很多 ,有人牽著羊.

TRANSL.notes: He took many (guavas), and one man carried a goat.

S.TRANSL: He took many , and one man carried a goat.

S.FORM: muculil mitaelib i nu sasa i kilang.
S.PHON: muʦur~ɾir~ɾ mitaər~ɾib i nu sasa i kir~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: muculil mitaelib i nu sasa i kilang.
S.PHON: muʦur~ɾir~ɾ mitaər~ɾib i nu sasa i kir~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 經過樹下.
walked by the tree.

S.FORM: nipipitpittu nya taw.
S.PHON: nipipitpittu nja taw.
S.FORM: nipipitpittu nya taw.
S.PHON: nipipitpittu nja taw.
S.TRANSL: 他在摘 .
He was picking .

S.FORM: sani sa izaw aca ku makabatikalay sa calicali'.
S.PHON: sani sa izaw aʦa ku makabatikar~ɾaj sa ʦar~ɾiʦar~ɾiʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: sani sa izaw aca ku makabatikalay sa calicali'.
S.PHON: sani sa izaw aʦa ku makabatikar~ɾaj sa ʦar~ɾiʦar~ɾiʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 不久又有騎腳踏車的走來走去.
Soon a bicycle rider walked to and fro.

S.FORM: nu mi mihicaay milisu'ay.
S.PHON: nu mi miħiʦaaj mir~ɾisuʔ~ʡaj.
S.FORM: nu mi mihicaay milisu'ay.
S.PHON: nu mi miħiʦaaj mir~ɾisuʔ~ʡaj.
S.TRANSL: 他要做什麼 不知道是不是在巡視.
What was he doing? Was he inspecting?

S.FORM: mimelawtu nipipitpit niza.
S.PHON: mimər~ɾawtu nipipitpit niza.
S.FORM: mimelawtu nipipitpit niza.
S.PHON: mimər~ɾawtu nipipitpit niza.
S.TRANSL: 他在看他摘.
The man saw that he was picking.

S.FORM: ta izawtu kya wawa niza.
S.PHON: ta izawtu kja wawa niza.
S.FORM: ta izawtu kya wawa niza.
S.PHON: ta izawtu kja wawa niza.
S.TRANSL: 有小孩.
There was a child.

S.FORM: mitupintu hiya u u kayabes i tiza han niza i nu ayawan nu batikal.
S.PHON: mitupintu ħija u u kajabəs i tiza ħan niza i nu ajawan nu batikar~ɾ.
S.FORM: mitupintu hiya u u kayabes i tiza han niza i nu ayawan nu batikal.
S.PHON: mitupintu ħija u u kajabəs i tiza ħan niza i nu ajawan nu batikar~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 在腳踏車前面好像載著番石榴之類的.
He carried something like pomegranate in the front of the bicycle.

S.FORM: muculil ciniza sa malalitemuhtu a tu zuma adiwawa.
S.PHON: muʦur~ɾir~ɾ ʦiniza sa mar~ɾar~ɾitəmuħtu a tu zuma adiwawa.
S.FORM: muculil ciniza sa malalitemuhtu a tu zuma adiwawa.
S.PHON: muʦur~ɾir~ɾ ʦiniza sa mar~ɾar~ɾitəmuħtu a tu zuma adiwawa.
S.TRANSL: 他遇到其他小孩.
He ran into other children.

S.FORM: mapulin ciniza talinukut.
S.PHON: mapur~ɾin ʦiniza tar~ɾinukut.
S.FORM: mapulin ciniza talinukut.
S.PHON: mapur~ɾin ʦiniza tar~ɾinukut.
S.TRANSL: 他跌倒及踢到 .
He fell and kicked .

S.FORM: mahantu kyami kya nitupinan niza a kayabes sa.
S.PHON: maħantu kjami kja nitupinan niza a kajabəs sa.
S.FORM: mahantu kyami kya nitupinan niza a kayabes sa.
S.PHON: maħantu kjami kja nitupinan niza a kajabəs sa.
S.TRANSL: 他載的番石榴該怎麼辦?
What could he do with his pomegranates which he carried?

S.FORM: iza ku malaklaktu i tiza i sasa.
S.PHON: iza ku mar~ɾakr~ɾaktu i tiza i sasa.
S.FORM: iza ku malaklaktu i tiza i sasa.
S.PHON: iza ku mar~ɾakr~ɾaktu i tiza i sasa.
S.TRANSL: 散落在地上.
They scattered on the ground.

S.FORM: ta mabilil ciniza misapud tya kayabes.
S.PHON: ta mabir~ɾir~ɾ ʦiniza misapud tja kajabəs.
S.FORM: ta mabilil ciniza misapud tya kayabes.
S.PHON: ta mabir~ɾir~ɾ ʦiniza misapud tja kajabəs.
S.TRANSL: 他趕緊撿番石榴.
He picked up the guavas in a hurry.

S.FORM: izaw kya masabuluday a adiwawa mabalabalakasay i tini i zazan sa.
S.PHON: izaw kja masabur~ɾudaj a adiwawa mabar~ɾabar~ɾakasaj i tini i zazan sa.
S.FORM: izaw kya masabuluday a adiwawa mabalabalakasay i tini i zazan sa.
S.PHON: izaw kja masabur~ɾudaj a adiwawa mabar~ɾabar~ɾakasaj i tini i zazan sa.
S.TRANSL: 有一群小孩在路上玩.
A group of children were playing on a road.

S.FORM: padang han nya katuuday a adiwawa.
S.PHON: padaŋ ħan nja katuudaj a adiwawa.
S.FORM: padang han nya katuuday a adiwawa.
S.PHON: padaŋ ħan nja katuudaj a adiwawa.
S.TRANSL: 大家都幫他.
Everyone helped him.

S.FORM: na saan sa mu mumultu ciniza masupelid niza ku tupelu.
S.PHON: na saan sa mu mumur~ɾtu ʦiniza masupər~ɾid niza ku tupər~ɾu.
S.FORM: na saan sa mu mumultu ciniza masupelid niza ku tupelu.
S.PHON: na saan sa mu mumur~ɾtu ʦiniza masupər~ɾid niza ku tupər~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 他走了而且忘了帽子.
He left and forgot his hat.

S.FORM: ta sani mumultu amin kya adiwawa mu mutaluma.
S.PHON: ta sani mumur~ɾtu amin kja adiwawa mu mutar~ɾuma.
S.FORM: ta sani mumultu amin kya adiwawa mu mutaluma.
S.PHON: ta sani mumur~ɾtu amin kja adiwawa mu mutar~ɾuma.
S.TRANSL: 不久那些孩子全都回家了.
Soon, all the children went home.

S.FORM: sa mikapet tu babalakasan nu heni u u sapad nipa nipasiketantu u kumu a a mali.
S.PHON: sa mikapət tu babar~ɾakasan nu ħəni u u sapad nipa nipasikətantu u kumu a a mar~ɾi.
S.FORM: sa mikapet tu babalakasan nu heni u u sapad nipa nipasiketantu u kumu a a mali.
S.PHON: sa mikapət tu babar~ɾakasan nu ħəni u u sapad nipa nipasikətantu u kumu a a mar~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 他們握著綁著橡皮球的玩具.
They hold their toys with a rubber ball on them.

S.FORM: tekateka sa a muculil.
S.PHON: təkatəka sa a muʦur~ɾir~ɾ.
S.FORM: tekateka sa a muculil.
S.PHON: təkatəka sa a muʦur~ɾir~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 一邊走一邊發出XXX的聲音.
They made click sound while walking.

S.FORM: kapahay a babalakasen nu babalakasan nu adiwawa.
S.PHON: kapaħaj a babar~ɾakasən nu babar~ɾakasan nu adiwawa.
S.FORM: kapahay a babalakasen nu babalakasan nu adiwawa.
S.PHON: kapaħaj a babar~ɾakasən nu babar~ɾakasan nu adiwawa.
S.TRANSL: 那是孩子們好玩的玩具.
That was a good toy for children.
